query_normalized: investigating the relationship between cosmic ray anisotropy and solar cycle variations physics
rationale: The paper studies how solar‑wind and interplanetary magnetic‑field variations (which are proxies for solar‑cycle activity) affect galactic cosmic‑ray intensity, thus providing empirical data on a key independent variable (solar activity) within the same cosmic‑ray domain that the user’s question concerns. This satisfies inclusion criterion (b).
